comment: Model-update manifest for Planner App. The app checks this when Settings opens and offers newer versions of INSTALLED models (approval-first, never automatic). Bump a model's 'version' only after the benchmark gate in docs/MODEL-UPDATES.md passes. 'id' must match an AsrModel id in transcriber.dart; version must be an integer greater than the previous one; sha256 is required for single-file ggml models.

models.label: Punjabi specialist (Whisper medium fine-tune, q5)
models.notes: q5_0 quantization of DevOG/whisper-punjabi-medium. v3 = same weights as v2 (end-to-end verification of the update channel). Benchmark 2026-07-13: CER 0.418 vs 0.447 f16 on the 25s ground-truth clip (app-style chunking); ~37s on-device inference vs 5-10+ min f16.
